name: Justabra

sheet.name: Justabra
sheet.background_story:
The adventures of Justabra and Mia. The Blind Nudist and Her Murderous Hound.

Born with a hereditary blindness, Justabra never adjusted as normal wagdie's do. She decide to be free of the world's constraints and find herself in the Primordial Lands. She found an enclave of like minded individuals in the Sibor's Mound and during her time there she met a unique Hound. She named her Mia.

description:
The adventures of Justabra and Mia. The Blind Nudist and Her Murderous Hound.

Born with a hereditary blindness, Justabra never adjusted as normal wagdie's do. She decide to be free of the world's constraints and find herself in the Primordial Lands. She found an enclave of like minded individuals in the Sibor's Mound and during her time there she met a unique Hound. She named her Mia.
